result.summary: jobs.googleapis.com exposes Google Cloud Talent Solution Job Search REST APIs on v4, plus deprecated v4beta1 and v3 REST versions; all require Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
result.description: Google Cloud Talent Solution Job Search lets employers, job boards, and related platforms manage job postings and search them with Google’s matching and filtering capabilities. The service is part of Google Cloud Talent Solution.

gcp_oauth.label: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access token
gcp_oauth.setup: Create or select a Google Cloud project in the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/), enable the Cloud Talent Solution / Job Search API for that project from the product docs, and authenticate using Google Cloud credentials. For REST calls, Google Cloud documents using OAuth 2.0 access tokens in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header; the easiest local path is to sign in with the [gcloud CLI](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud) and obtain credentials via [Application Default Credentials](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/provide-credentials-adc) or follow [Authenticate for using REST](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/rest). Service accounts can also obtain short-lived OAuth access tokens as described in [Service account credentials](https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/service-account-creds).
